items.titolo: Is Microsoft 365 Premium worth it? What $20 a month gets you - and how it compares to ChatGPT Plus

items.titolo: The AI IPO Race Heats Up, DOGE Whistleblower Sues Elon Musk, and Instagram Gets Hacked
items.descrizione: On Uncanny Valley, we dive into the IPO bonanza that the top AI companies are embarking on to the point where some real estate listings are looking for not just regular old cash, but Anthropic stock.
